name: Deadeye
description: Uncanny aim with a ranged weapon. All range penalties for a ranged Combat Training specialization may be reduced by up to 10/Tier.

name: Fast Attack
description: Quick reflexes let you act before others. Gain +5/Tier to your Initiative.

name: Foiler
description: Incorporated moves in one Melee Weapon or Unarmed specialization designed to cause your opponent to mishandle his weapon. Any round you use an appropriate weapon or unarmed attack, any foe attacking you that you are aware of has the fumble numbers of all of his attacks increased by 1/Tier.

name: Opportunistic Strike
description: If in melee combat with a foe and your foe fumbles, you may make an immediate attack roll against him (0 AP, OB not reduced for AP or Parrying).

name: Pressing the Advantage
description: Aggressive fighting style. Every time you inflict a critical on your opponent using one selected Melee Weapon or Unarmed specialization, you gain +10 OB/Tier to your next attack against this foe.

name: Quickdraw / Quickload
description: Drawing or loading for a specified ranged Combat Training specialization is treated as instantaneous (0 AP) rather than 1 AP.

name: Slow on the Draw
description: Clumsy with all weapons when surprised. Drawing your weapon or readying an arrow takes you 2 AP.

name: Riposte
description: When using all of your OB to parry with one Melee Weapon or Unarmed specialization, you may attempt a riposte attack. If the parry is effective, you may make an immediate (0 AP) attack with an OB of 50 minus the foe's total modified attack roll.

name: Sense Weakness
description: Able to sense a foe's weakness by observing him for one round (requires Concentration and Medium Perception maneuver). With a Success, you may reroll one critical against him.

name: Sharpshooter
description: For each full round you spend aiming, you gain +5 to your OB with one ranged Combat Training specialization, to a maximum of +5/Tier.

name: Frenzy
description: Enter a frenzied rage with a successful Adrenal Focus maneuver. While frenzied: +5 Strength, attacks treated as +1 Size, no penalties due to hit loss. Continue fighting below 0 Hits until reaching negative Body Development hits. Always attack closest creature. Adrenal Focus maneuver required to exit.

name: Light Sleeper
description: Receive a +25 bonus to Perception rolls to awake from sleep.

name: Heavy Sleeper
description: Difficult to awaken; receive -25 to Perception rolls to awaken from sleep. Difficulty of the maneuver is set by the GM.

name: Eloquence
description: Exceptionally gifted at magic. Receive +5/Tier to all Spellcasting rolls.

name: Extended Reach
description: Able to cast Touch spells from a single spell list with a range of 5'/Tier. Any range modifiers apply normally using the actual range. (Tier I costs 15 DP, then +5 DP per additional Tier.)

name: Graceful Recovery
description: Lower chance of catastrophic failure when casting spells. Spell Failure rolls are reduced by up to 5/Tier (to a minimum of 1).

name: Inglorious Failure
description: When you suffer a Spell Failure, your Spell Failure roll is increased by 5/Tier.

name: Mumbler
description: Penalty of -5/Tier to all Spellcasting rolls.

name: Power Recycling
description: When you fail casting a spell you are able to recover ½ (Tier I) or all (Tier II) of the Power Points used.

name: Quick-Caster
description: Particularly adept at quickly casting spells from one of your spell lists. The number of Action Points required to cast is 2-3 AP (Tier I) or 2 AP (Tier II).

name: Scope Skills
description: Spells from one of your spell lists affect a greater area than normal and have their radius or # of targets increased by +100%/Tier. If used with directed spells, applicable directed spells OB must be split between the attacks.

name: Spatial Skills
description: Spells from one of your spell lists work at greater distances than normal and have their ranges increased by +50%/Tier.

name: Subconscious Discipline
description: Able to extend the duration of Concentration based spells beyond your actual time of concentration. The spell will continue for half (Tier I) or the total (Tier II) rounds spent concentrating after concentration has ceased.

name: Temporal Skills
description: Spells from one of your spell lists last longer than normal and have their duration increased by +50%/Tier. This only affects spells that have a duration.

name: Ambidextrous
description: Able to use either hand equally well for all maneuvers and activities. The normal -20 penalty for off-hand usage does not apply.

name: Beast of Burden
description: Body is particularly well-suited for carrying heavy loads. May carry an additional 10%/Tier of body weight as encumbrance without penalty (encumbrance penalties are not reduced for Dodging).

name: Slow Bleeder
description: Abnormal ability to clot bleeding wounds. Each bleeding injury is reduced by 1 hit/round for each Tier. Slow Bleeder may prevent bleeding entirely.

name: Rapid Bleeder
description: Inability to clot bleeding wounds. Each bleeding injury is increased by 1 hit/round for each Tier.

name: Uncoordinated
description: Terribly uncoordinated; difficult time moving while performing other actions. Penalties to actions made while moving are treated as if you were moving 1 pace (Tier I) or 2 paces (Tier II) higher than your actual pace.

name: Additional Limb Pair
description: Possess an additional pair of arms per Tier. The additional arms may be used to manipulate and to make attacks (with the usual penalties for multiple attacks). If the additional limbs are legs unable to make attacks, use Increased Stride instead.

name: Breath Holding
description: May hold your breath for up to 1 minute per character level. If you remain inactive, the time may be doubled, or tripled with a successful Meditation maneuver.

name: Darkvision
description: Can see 10'/Tier even in complete darkness. Nightvision is normally a prerequisite for this talent. (Tier I costs 10 DP, then +5 DP per additional Tier.)

name: Defensive Aura
description: A glowing or blurred aura surrounds you, making you more difficult to target. You receive +5 DB/Tier. Not cumulative with any Aura or Blur spell.

name: Efficient Sleeper
description: Require less sleep than most people, able to get benefits from 3 hours (Tier I) or 2 hours (Tier II) of sleep as others do in 4. Changes the rate at which you recover Power Points, but not the total per night.

name: Restless Sleeper
description: Must sleep 5 hours (Tier I) or 6 hours (Tier II) to get the benefit of 4 hours. Changes the rate at which you recover Power Points, but not the total per night.

name: Elemental Resistance
description: Particularly resistant to one element (Cold/Ice, Heat/Fire, or Electricity/Light). Gain +5/Tier to DBs, RRs, and Endurance against the selected element. Also applies to extreme environmental conditions.

name: Elemental Susceptibility
description: Particularly susceptible to one element (Cold/Ice, Heat/Fire, or Electricity/Light). Suffer -5/Tier to DBs, RRs, and Endurance against the selected element. Also applies to extreme environmental conditions.

name: Enhanced Attack
description: Able to put an incredible amount of momentum and power into one of your natural attacks (e.g., Bite, Striking). Its size is increased by +1 size/Tier.

name: Lesser Attack
description: Your natural attack is weak relative to your size and is decreased by -1 size/Tier.

name: Extra Joints
description: Limbs are multiply-jointed or extra flexible (e.g., a tentacle) and agile. All activity with the limb, including melee, throwing, and movement, gains a +20 bonus.

name: Fast Healer
description: Recover faster than normal. Recovery times are cut in half.

name: Slow Healer
description: Recover slower than normal. Recovery times are doubled.

name: Hearing, Cat
description: Hearing equivalent to that of a cat. Able to hear very high-pitched sounds. Improved ability to locate a sound's source, gaining +10 on Perception maneuvers to locate a sound.

name: Hearing, Dog
description: Hearing as sensitive as a dog. Can pinpoint nearby sounds with high accuracy and may hear sounds up to 4 times as far away as a human, including very high-pitched sounds. Grants +10 on sound-based Perception maneuvers.

name: Hearing, Hare
description: Hearing is very good in the high and low frequency range. May localize sounds with great accuracy and hear danger coming from 10 times farther than a human. Gain +20 on hearing Perception maneuvers.

name: Heatsense
description: Sensitive temperature organs that allow gauging temperature at close range. May detect nearby prey or tracks within several hours of passing. Grants +20 on Perception and Tracking maneuvers to detect living creatures or warm/cold objects within close proximity.

name: Immune to Disease
description: Exceptional health. Immune to all normal, natural diseases (Tier I, 10 DP) or all diseases including magical ones (Tier II, 30 DP total).

name: Increased Size
description: One size (per Tier) larger than medium. Larger size makes attacks more powerful and increases number of concussion hits.

name: Decreased Size
description: One size (per Tier) smaller than medium. Smaller size weakens attacks and reduces concussion hits.

name: Increased Stride
description: Base movement rate is increased by 2'/round for each Tier.

name: Decreased Stride
description: Base movement rate is decreased by 2'/round for each Tier.

name: Light-boned
description: Lightly built and relatively fragile for your size. Your concussion hits and any attacks made against you are adjusted as if you were one size smaller per Tier. Attacks you make against others are not adjusted.

name: Light Sensitivity
description: Cannot take direct sunlight. Penalty of -25/Tier when in bright light equal to direct sunlight. Penalty reduced by 25 for cloudy day, 50 for partially shaded/very cloudy, 75 in full shadows.

name: Magical Resistance
description: Innate resistance to one of the realms of magic. Receive +5/Tier to all Resistance Rolls versus that realm.

name: Magical Vulnerability
description: Innate vulnerability to one of the realms of magic. Receive -5/Tier to all Resistance Rolls versus that realm.

name: Natural Armor
description: Skin/hide/carapace gives +1 AT/Tier natural armor. Incurs no encumbrance or maneuver penalties. Does not interfere with magic. If combined with worn armor, use the higher AT; if worn armor is heavier, add number of tiers as DB.

name: Natural Weaponry
description: Some type of natural weaponry (e.g., Bite, Claw, Sting, Horn, etc.) and may develop skill with it. Allows creatures to get an attack at -1 size for free.

name: Nightvision
description: Can see in dim light as well as a human can see in daylight. All darkness penalties (other than complete pitch dark) are reduced by 40. More susceptible to sudden bright lights while using Nightvision.

name: Physical Resistance
description: Innate resistance to physical ailments (e.g., poison, disease). Receive +5/Tier to all Physical Resistance Rolls.

name: Physical Vulnerability
description: Innate vulnerability to physical ailments (e.g., poison, disease). Receive -5/Tier to all Physical Resistance Rolls.

name: Poison Injection
description: One of your natural attacks (typically a bite or stinger) injects poison. If the attack scores a critical (any severity), the target must make a Physical RR against your level or suffer the effect of the poison (typically Circulatory poison).

name: Recurved Musculature
description: Muscles have tremendous capacity and store potential energy like springs. Base jump distance is tripled. Receive +20 bonus to Acrobatics, Climbing, Jumping, and Running maneuvers (other than Dodging).

name: Sight, Eagle
description: Keen eyesight permits good peripheral vision and the ability to focus on distant objects such as a hare two miles away. Gain +20 bonus to all vision-based Perception maneuvers.

name: Sight, Gecko
description: Eyes perform like those of a gecko, permitting additional detail close-up and good depth vision. Do not lose color vision in dark conditions. Gain +10 bonus to all vision-based Perception maneuvers.

name: Sight, Hawk
description: Exceptional vision, permitting you to see objects up to 5 miles away with great sharpness and the ability to spot tiny movements. Gain +30 bonus to all vision-based Perception maneuvers.

name: Strike Reflex
description: Powerful strike reflex allows you to act with tremendous speed (+20 initiative modifier) when the reflex is triggered by any sudden movement towards or away from you by a target within range. This instinctive response is impossible to quell; you must take immediate offensive action.

name: Superior Stat
description: An average being of your race is superior in one of the 10 statistics over the average human. Get +1/Tier to the stats bonus. This talent can only be taken as a racial talent.

name: Inferior Stat
description: An average being of your race is inferior in one of the 10 statistics. Get -1/Tier to the stats bonus. This talent can only be taken as a racial talent.

name: Tetrachromatic Vision
description: Vision encompasses normal color vision as well as sensitivity to ultraviolet light. Sense of colors differs from other races. Penalties for spotting invisible (including Unseen spell) and camouflaged people/objects are reduced by 30.

name: Third Eyelid
description: Eyes have a transparent additional eyelid (nictating membrane) which protects them while still permitting sight. Unaffected by dust, sand, or water which otherwise might limit use of your eyes.

name: Tough
description: Exceptionally tough with higher pain tolerance than others. Grants +5/Tier to base hits. Base hits are normally equal to 25.

name: Fragile
description: Exceptionally fragile with lower pain tolerance than others. Penalty of -5/Tier to base hits. Base hits are normally equal to 25.

name: Vigorous
description: Incredible stamina. Gain +10/Tier modifier to all Endurance rolls.

name: Feeble
description: Lack of stamina. Suffer -10/Tier modifier to all Endurance rolls.

name: Wings, Vestigial
description: Small wings which are not adequate for flight, but provide a +10 bonus to Jumping and when using Acrobatics to reduce the impact of a fall.

name: Acute Hearing
description: Heightened sense of hearing, providing +5/Tier to Perception rolls involving hearing.

name: Poor Hearing
description: Deficient sense of hearing, providing -5/Tier to Perception rolls involving hearing.

name: Acute Smell
description: Heightened sense of smell, providing +5/Tier to Perception rolls involving smell.

name: Poor Smell
description: Deficient sense of smell, providing -5/Tier to Perception rolls involving smell.

name: Acute Taste
description: Superb sense of taste, providing +5/Tier to Perception rolls involving taste.

name: Poor Taste
description: Deficient sense of taste, providing -5/Tier to Perception rolls involving taste.

name: Acute Touch
description: Unusually sensitive tactile senses, providing +5/Tier to Perception rolls involving touch.

name: Poor Touch
description: Deficient tactile senses, providing -5/Tier to Perception rolls involving touch.

name: Acute Vision
description: Heightened sight, providing +5/Tier to Perception rolls involving vision.

name: Poor Vision
description: Deficient sight, providing -5/Tier to Perception rolls involving vision.

name: Animal Empathy
description: Affinity with a particular kind of animal. Any maneuvers involving one type of animal are at +25. If you associate with an animal of that type for one month, you can communicate empathically to a range of 100'. For each Tier beyond I, the range is increased by 25'. (Tier I costs 15 DP, then +5 DP per additional Tier.)

name: Destiny Sense
description: Instinctively know the direction (Tier I) or direction and distance (Tier II) that will take you to a specific goal. This can be used once per day.

name: Direction Sense
description: By detecting the planet's magnetic field or other means, always able to discern which direction is north. This grants a +30 bonus to Navigation.

name: Empathy
description: Can read emotions of those within 25'. If a target is trying to hide his emotions, he gets a Resistance Roll vs. your level; Success means you cannot 'read' that target for 24 hours. This ability grants a +50 bonus to Social Awareness when appropriate.

name: Extra Sense
description: Can sense something that normally cannot be sensed. Tier I: inside body. Tier II: in contact with body. Tier III: general direction/intensity, attack unseen targets at -50. Tier IV: direction, intensity, and distance, attack unseen at -25. Tier V: specific detail, attack unseen targets normally.

name: Missing Sense
description: Completely missing a sense. Costs vary: Taste (-5 DP), Touch (-10 DP), Smell (-10 DP), Hearing (-15 DP), Sight (-20 DP). Suffer -100 penalty on actions requiring the sense, and -20 to -50 on actions that would benefit from it.

name: One Eye
description: Have sight only in one eye. Lack distance perception and peripheral vision on the affected side. All ranged attacks suffer a -25 penalty.

name: Visions
description: Able to receive spontaneous visions of persons/places/objects based upon objects touched with bare skin. The details are at the GM's discretion. Can be used once per day for every Tier. (Tier I costs 30 DP, then +10 DP per additional Tier.)

name: Distinct Odor
description: Have a distinct odor that transfers to objects touched with bare skin. Grants others a +50 bonus to Perception and Tracking efforts based on smell to detect or track you.

name: Disturbing Voice
description: Grating or annoying tone of voice. Penalty of -20/Tier to any maneuver to verbally calm or persuade (Influence, Singing, Leadership, etc.).

name: Golden Throat
description: Soothing and calming voice. Gives +10/Tier to any maneuver to verbally calm or persuade (Charm, Singing, Leadership, etc.).

name: Iron Will
description: Formidable willpower. Get a bonus of +5/Tier to Resistance Rolls versus mental spells (attack, informational, or otherwise).

name: Look of Eagles
description: With the gift of inspiration, get +10/Tier to all Leadership maneuvers and followers get +2/Tier to fear RRs.

name: Math Illiterate
description: Never learned basic math. Cannot add or subtract without fingers, cannot multiply at all, and cannot count higher than 20.

name: Multilingual
description: Grew up in a multilingual culture or has always been able to learn languages quickly when immersed in them. Gain 10 ranks in one language or 5 ranks in each of two languages.

name: Mute
description: Cannot speak, although can understand speech and may communicate via other means such as sign language or gesture if you have the ability to do so.

name: Neutral Odor
description: Naturally have a very weak odor. Makes all attempts to perceive your presence based upon smell operate at -50. Penalty may be reduced if carrying objects or equipment that carry strong odors.

name: Non-violent
description: Do not want to hurt others, and flinch with remorse when doing so. After inflicting a critical, any action you take in the following round suffers a penalty of -20/Tier.

name: Perfect Pitch
description: Perfect pitch and able to reproduce any pitch with voice or appropriate instrument. Gain +10/Tier to a Performance Art: Singing or Play Instrument skill. Cannot be combined with Golden Throat to get a higher bonus to Singing; use the talent with the highest bonus.

name: Prodigy
description: Unusual innate ability giving a bonus of +5/Tier to a single skill (all specializations).

name: Inept
description: Inexplicably jinxed in a single skill, suffering -5/Tier to all maneuvers in that skill (all specializations).

name: Restricted Diet
description: Diet limited to certain foods which are normally available but may not be in all circumstances. Other foods either provide no sustenance or will cause operation at significant penalties (at least -20) for the next 24 hours.

name: Revulsion
description: Cannot stand the sight of blood. Each round a bleeding character (or bloody corpse) is in view, must make a Fear/Terror RR equal to the amount of bleeding visible. Treat bloody corpses as 10/round bleeding for this calculation.
